testcase.name: test_allotment_optional_fields[empty-payload0]

failure.message: AssertionError: variant=empty payload={} -> 500 Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter25_reports_allotment.py:147: in test_allotment_optional_fields assert r.status_code == 200, f"variant={label} payload={payload} -> {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: variant=empty payload={} -> 500 Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
